# Dogfood orchestration transcript fixture

--- resumed-startup ---
resuming prior session for @backend, @ci, @host — pass `--fresh` to start clean

--- status-authorization ---
@backend 和 @ci 都给了完整只读命令清单,但都明确 "需要 @host 点头才执行"。我没有自动跑,等你确认:
• 是否授权 @ci 执行 A(6 条 cargo audit / deny / geiger 命令,纯只读)?
• 是否授权 @backend 并行做 cost.rs / bridge.rs 的结构化展示原型 diff?

--- explicit-multitarget ---
@backend @ci: run the read-only audit commands only after host approval.
Return findings with path:line evidence and no code changes.

--- shared-header-with-role-scopes ---
@backend @frontend @qa @security @ci: Review the codeRoom project at `/Users/zhuchaojie/Desktop/codes/codeRoom`. Read-only Tier 0. Scope per role:

• @backend: Audit `src/` architecture and routing model. Cite files.

• @frontend: Audit the REPL UX in `src/repl/` and `src/output/`. Cite gaps.

• @qa: Identify untested critical paths before 1.0.

• @security: Threat-model review of peer-quote, permission gating, and bypass mode.

• @ci: Audit `.github/workflows/` and release pipeline gaps.
